name: ACE Pickleball Club - Des Plaines
description: Ace Pickleball Club - Des Plaines is the only facility of its kind, delivering a member-focused approach and all-inclusive pricing. Professional-grade cushioned courts, combined with a welcoming community, create the optimal playing experience for all skill levels. Unique programming and clinics offered free to members to improve their game.  Pickleball 101 classes are FREE GLOW Pickleball Nights turn the entire facility into a fun new atmosphere to play the game!  Snacks and non-alcoholic beverages available for purchase (cashless facility). OPEN PLAY available all day without reservations. Just show up and play!
open_play_schedule: Open Play during all opening hours with the occasional exception for the APC Championship Series Tournament
fees: Members only — Membership currently $129/month for unlimited access and amenities. Drop-in fee for non-members.  Free court reservations for members-only during non-peak hours.

name: SPF All Day
description:
SPF All Day is a fully automated, indoor pickleball facility in Chicago designed for play anytime, day or night. The facility is open 24/7, and your court reservation serves as your key for entry, giving you access to the space during your booked time.

The facility features six dedicated indoor hard courts with permanent nets and lines, including two championship-sized courts. Courts are reservable in advance, and access is granted only during your reservation window.

SPF All Day is a streamlined, play-focused space. There are no locker rooms, food service, or a staffed front desk on-site.

The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Western Springs Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Western Springs Rec Center in Western Springs, IL! There are 6 courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: West Indian Gardens
description: West Indian Gardens is a place to play pickleball in Riverside, IL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Wheeling Park District - Chambers Park
description: Wheeling Park District - Chambers Park is a place to play pickleball in Wheeling, IL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Wheeling Park District Community Recreatuon Center
description: Wheeling Park District Community Recreatuon Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wheeling, IL. There are 6 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, locker rooms, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
